title: 怪钟疑案
summary:
Eina, feeling confused and unable to make sense of a recent conversation, walks from the grain market to Albany Road. She heads toward Wilbraham Crescent to visit 19 Wilbraham Crescent, the site of a reported murder at Miss Pemaroo's residence. Onlookers gather at the house to speculate on the crime, discussing rumors that a man broke in through a back window to steal silverware and was killed with a kitchen knife. Bystanders note that the homeowner is blind and that a girl involved in the incident is in a state of shock. Ina Brent, caught in the crowd, stares at the house and begins to contemplate the murder until a voice startles her.

In a separate narration, Colin Lamb observes Hilary Webber leaving an inquest room following her testimony. Colin approaches her and suggests brunch at a Chinese restaurant, but Hilary declines, stating she must shop before her work shift begins at 2 pm. After they agree to meet later, Colin reflects on his deep feelings for Hilary.

Later, Colin visits Dick Hakast at the police station. They discuss the inquest and medical evidence. Colin reports that an expert believes the murder is a "simple" case because the perpetrator's plan was overly complicated. The expert suggested interviewing neighbors. Dick reveals that the murder weapon—a recently sharpened kitchen knife—was found at the house of a "cat lady," though it had been wiped clean of fingerprints. They discuss the theory that the victim was first anesthetized elsewhere and then transported to number 19, possibly from a nearby house with an adjacent garden.
